resources.string: Move slowly until tracking dots appear, then tap each edge through the centre.
Tracking ready — tap the first edge of the target.
First pin placed — tap the opposite edge through the centre.
Diameter measured — confirm or reset pins.
Installing ARCore… reopen AR ruler after install.
ARCore is not available on this device.
Camera busy — close other camera apps and try again.
No surface at tap — move closer and point at the target face.
